name: Braised Herbed Cucumbers
recipeIngredient: Fresh parsley or dill for garnish
recipeInstructions:
If using regular cucumbers, peel the cucumbers, halve them lengthwise, and scoop out the seeds with a small spoon. This is not necessary with English cucumbers. Cut into 1-inch x 1 1/4 inches pieces.
Sprinkle with salt and vinegar; let stand for 2 to 3 hours at room temperature. Drain and pat dry.
Preheat oven to 375°F. Transfer cucumbers to a stove-to-oven dish; toss with butter, dill, chives, shallots, and white pepper. Bake for 20 minutes or until barely tender. Remove from oven; add cream. Toss and cook over medium heat for about 5 minutes or until the cream is reduced and thickened. Sprinkle with minced parsley for garnish. Serves 6-8.
